place: Chaweng Beach, Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Beachfront Four-Bedroom Villa with 32m Lap Pool - Chaweng
blurb: A beachfront four-bedroom villa opening straight onto the sand at Chaweng, built around a 32m green-stone lap pool with a separate children's plunge pool and a sunken poolside sala — vaulted wood ceilings, walls of glass that slide away to the Gulf, and a full staff led by a private chef.
detail:
Set directly on the beach at Chaweng, this four-bedroom villa places the Gulf a few steps beyond the pool deck. High vaulted ceilings, exposed timber beams and a cedar-shingle roof give the interiors an airy, modern calm, while every room is walled in glass that slides fully away to the garden, the pool or the sea. The open-plan living and dining space flows out to a covered veranda with its own al-fresco lounge and second dining table, so the line between inside and out all but disappears.

The centrepiece is a 32-metre lap pool tiled in Balinese green stone, edged by sun beds, umbrellas and a sunken, shaded sala for lazy afternoons. At the far end a separate three-by-four-metre plunge pool gives younger guests their own shallow water, safely set apart from the main pool. The large deck has room for meals, games and evening drinks with the sea as backdrop.

Each of the four bedrooms is elegantly furnished with a king bed, en-suite bathroom with walk-in rain shower, built-in wardrobes, personal safe, mini-bar and smart TV with Netflix. Two master suites open onto the pool deck with their own lounge areas; the remaining rooms enjoy sea views and garden access, wrapped in greenery.

The villa is fully staffed, with an English-speaking villa manager, housekeeper, handyman and a trained Thai chef preparing meals and barbecues on site. A gym and a private cinema round out the amenities, and a concierge is on hand to arrange tours, transfers and anything else the stay calls for.
